% Auto-generated evidence-chain snippet for H1.
\paragraph{H1: shared decode-time workspace exists.} We test whether the decode-time shared set size $|S_\ell(\tau,m)|$ is larger than expected by chance under two nulls: (i) Null-1 (permutation of task-specific relative-variance scores) and (ii) Null-2 (per-task orthogonal scramble followed by re-estimation). We reject H1 when $|S_\ell(\tau,m)|$ is not in the tail of either null distribution; equivalently, when either $p_1$ or $p_2$ is not significant. Table~\ref{tab:h1_full_benchmark} reports $|S|$, $p_1$, and $p_2$ across the full/pooled/loosened settings.
